nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']

# Find white dot
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"White dot at: {n['boundary']}")

# Check orange count (should still be 46 since X moved to [18, 30])
orange_count = sum(1 for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'O' and n['pixels'] == 1)
print(f"Orange dots: {orange_count}")

# Check red count
red_count = sum(1 for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'r' and n['pixels'] == 1)
print(f"Red dots: {red_count}")

# Check blue cross
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] > 20:
        print(f"Blue cross: {n['pixels']} pixels")

# The bbox was [30, 39, 63, 62] - white dot moved from [30, 39] to somewhere in that region

</parameter>
</function>
